name: Seafood Souffle Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove crusts from bread and cube the remaining 6 slices.
2. Spread the cubed bread on the bottom of a 9" x 13" baking dish.
3. Mix together the flaked Halibut, sliced Celery, chopped Onion, Sliced water chestnuts, and Canned mushrooms (sliced).
4. Spread the seafood mixture over the bread cubes, seasoning with salt and pepper.
5. Cube the remaining bread slices and place them on top of the seafood mixture.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together the beaten Eggs, Milk, and Mayonnaise.
7. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the casserole in the baking dish.
8. Cover with the Cream of chicken soup and refrigerate overnight (covered).
9. When ready to bake, remove from the refrigerator and cover with additional Cream of chicken soup.
10. Bake at 325 degrees F for 45 minutes (uncovered).
11. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with Grated cheddar cheese.
12. Return to the oven and bake an additional 15 minutes until set.
Excellent for a potluck or crowd. Good with crab, shrimp, or halibut.
